scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ai-desk/contracts-projects build && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/contracts-runtime build && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/contracts-execution build && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/contracts-llm build && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/contracts-api build && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/ui build && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/web build && pnpm quality:web && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/api build && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/worker build
scripts.lint: pnpm exec biome check . && pnpm run lint:eslint && pnpm run lint:style && pnpm run lint:boundaries && pnpm run lint:ui && pnpm run lint:ecosystem && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/api lint && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/worker lint
scripts.doctor: node ./scripts/check-local-git-identity.mjs && pnpm -r list --depth -1 && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ai-desk/contracts-projects typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/contracts-runtime typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/contracts-execution typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/contracts-llm typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/contracts-api typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-desk/worker typecheck
